education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Data Science

experience.title: Healthcare Data Analyst
responsibilities: Conducted in-depth data analysis to drive insights into patient care outcomes.
Utilized SQL for managing and querying large datasets to support clinical initiatives.
Developed interactive dashboards using Tableau for visualization of health metrics.
Collaborated with clinical teams to ensure compliance with healthcare regulations including HIPAA.
Performed predictive analytics to identify trends in patient readmissions.

experience.title: Junior Data Analyst
responsibilities: Assisted in data cleaning and preparation for analysis projects.
Supported senior analysts in the implementation of quality improvement initiatives.
Participated in team meetings to discuss data-driven strategies.

response.summary: Experienced healthcare data analyst with a solid background in SQL and data visualization. Passionate about leveraging data to enhance patient outcomes and operational efficiency.
